context: Tests whether the agent implements dark mode using the correct data-theme attribute pattern, respects media query fallback with the proper :root:not() guard, uses only semantic CSS custom properties in component styles, and correctly handles theme persistence and synchronous initialization.

checklist.name: Semantic vars only in components
checklist.description: Component CSS files reference only semantic CSS variables (e.g., `var(--store-color-brand-primary)`) — no raw hex/rgb colors, no global tier variables like `--store-color-gray-50`

checklist.name: No hard-coded values in CSS
checklist.description: Component CSS does NOT contain any hard-coded color literals (hex, rgb(), hsl()) — color values come entirely from CSS custom properties

checklist.name: Dark token overrides file
checklist.description: A dark mode token file (e.g., tokens/dark.json) exists that overrides semantic color tokens for dark mode surface, text, and border colors

checklist.name: data-theme attribute selector
checklist.description: Generated or hand-authored dark mode CSS applies overrides under the `[data-theme="dark"]` attribute selector

checklist.name: Media query with :not guard
checklist.description: Dark mode CSS includes an `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)` block whose rule uses `:root:not([data-theme="light"])` (not just `:root`) to respect the explicit light override

checklist.name: Sync head script for FOUC
checklist.description: HTML or template includes an inline `<script>` in `<head>` that reads `localStorage` and sets `data-theme` on `document.documentElement` before the body renders, preventing flash of unstyled content

checklist.name: localStorage persistence
checklist.description: Theme toggle logic saves the chosen theme to `localStorage` (key: `'theme'`) and reads it back on initialization

checklist.name: System default support
checklist.description: Theme toggle supports a 'system' value that removes the `data-theme` attribute from `document.documentElement` (delegating to the media query)

checklist.name: data-theme on documentElement
checklist.description: Theme toggle applies light/dark by calling `document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', ...)` and removes it for system preference

checklist.name: No global tokens in components
checklist.description: Component styles do NOT reference global-tier token names such as `--store-color-gray-*`, `--store-color-blue-*` etc. — only semantic names
